# Data Access Layer  

This class diagram is showing the data access layer.
This layer will receive the raw data from out source and exchange to inside outcome and send it to other part.

'DataListener' will connect to the data source and get the raw input as a model. To extend this abstract class we have 'TCPDataListener', 'WebSocketDataListener', 'FileDataListener' all three. This makes the system manage several kinds of data source.

'DataParser' will exchange the format of the data from raw data to the inside format of the system. 

'ParsedData' is a data object generated by parse. It holds several main data.

'DataSourceAdapter' will be connected to 'DataListener' and get raw data and give to 'DataParser' and manage the whole system.

Overall, this system holds abstract and getter from outside source and independent inside outside system.
